name: PSP Swiss Property AG
summary: PSP Swiss Property AG, together with its subsidiaries, owns and operates real estate properties in Switzerland. It operates through Real Estate Investments and Property Management segments. The company owns, operates, and leases office, retail and commercial, and storage properties; and parking spaces. It owns 160 office and commercial properties; and 16 development sites and individual projects primarily in Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Bern, and Lausanne. PSP Swiss Property AG was founded in 1999 and is based in Zug, Switzerland.
